title: stachys spinulosa
intro: Stachys spinulosa, also known as prickly hedged hyssop or prickly hedge hyssop, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Stachys spinulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
